summary: Iteration 231 - Mixer Media & Templates Testing Complete. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). All new features working: (1) 12 Mix Templates across 4 tiers with proper lock status. (2) Tiered Video Recording Config (480p→4K). (3) Tiered Audio Recording Config (44.1kHz→192kHz). (4) Tiered AI Generation with Gemini integration. Frontend: Templates, Record, and AI Gen buttons visible and functional. Templates panel shows 12 templates with tier badges. Recording panel shows Camera (1080p/60fps/8Mbps) and Mic (96kHz/Stereo/24-bit) configs with tier comparison grid. AI Gen panel shows prompt input with tier comparison.

minor.issue: aiofiles module was not loading initially due to missing import in deps.py route loader - fixed by restarting backend

issues: Trial Graduation modal blocks page interaction - user must dismiss it first. This is expected behavior but may confuse users.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend mixer_media.py correctly implements 12 MIX_TEMPLATES with proper tier distribution (3 per tier)
VIDEO_TIERS correctly configured: 480p SD → 720p HD → 1080p Full HD → 4K Ultra HD
AUDIO_TIERS correctly configured: 44.1kHz mono → 48kHz stereo → 96kHz stereo → 192kHz spatial
Template apply endpoint correctly returns 403 for locked templates (sovereign for ultra_player)
Recording config endpoint returns all comparison data for tier grid display
AI generation uses Gemini when available, falls back to algorithmic generation
Frontend SuanpanMixer.js correctly implements Templates, Record, and AI Gen panels with tier comparison grids
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 231 verified all new mixer media features: (1) 12 Mix Templates (3 discovery, 3 player, 3 ultra_player, 3 sovereign) with proper tier gating - ultra_player sees 9 unlocked, 3 locked. (2) Tiered video recording config with resolution progression 480p→4K. (3) Tiered audio recording config with sample rate progression 44.1kHz→192kHz. (4) Tiered AI generation with Gemini integration and algorithmic fallback. (5) Frontend Templates panel shows all 12 templates with tier badges. (6) Frontend Recording panel shows Camera + Mic configs with tier comparison grid. (7) Frontend AI Gen panel shows prompt input with tier comparison. (8) All regression tests pass - mixer subscription, sources, projects, auto-compose goals, consciousness status all working.

backend_templates_12_total.details: GET /api/mixer/templates returns 12 templates with tier distribution 3+3+3+3

backend_templates_lock_status.details: Ultra player sees 9 unlocked (discovery+player+ultra_player) and 3 locked (sovereign)

backend_apply_sovereign_template_403.details: POST /api/mixer/templates/apply with tpl-cosmic-immersion returns 403 for ultra_player

backend_recording_config_tiered.details: GET /api/mixer/recording/config returns video (1080p/60fps/8Mbps), audio (96kHz/stereo/24-bit) for ultra_player

backend_recording_config_all_tiers.details: Response includes all_video_tiers, all_audio_tiers, all_ai_tiers for comparison

backend_ai_capabilities.details: GET /api/mixer/ai/capabilities returns Pro AI Studio with 12 max tracks for ultra_player

frontend_templates_button.details: Templates button visible in toolbar and opens template panel

frontend_record_button.details: Record button visible in toolbar and opens recording panel

frontend_ai_gen_button.details: AI Gen button visible in toolbar and opens AI generation panel

frontend_templates_panel_content.details: Templates panel shows Morning Ritual, Chakra Journey, Cosmic Immersion templates

frontend_recording_panel_content.details: Recording panel shows Camera (1080p Full HD) and Mic (96kHz) configs with tier comparison

frontend_ai_gen_panel_content.details: AI Gen panel shows prompt input, duration selector, and tier comparison grid
